response.reasoning: Bogdan has 19 years of software engineering experience (exceeding the 15-year minimum) with clear progression to staff-level roles and demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective. His technical breadth spans web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure, with evidence of leadership through workshops, mentoring, and speaking engagements. However, the resume presents a critical mismatch: the position explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' yet the resume contains zero AI/ML projects, no demonstrated AI products, and no work with machine learning systems or AI platforms. The only AI-adjacent work is very recent (April 2025 at re:cinq with MCP and agentic workflows), which is too nascent to establish domain expertise. Additionally, there is no advanced degree in AI (preferred Master's/PhD) and limited evidence of deep cloud platform strategy experience beyond AWS CDK usage at one company.
strengths: 19 years of software engineering experience with staff-level progression and clear seniority demonstrated across multiple organizations
Proven thought leadership and mentoring ability through workshops, courses, conference talks, and open-source projects with real adoption (GISCollective used by Green Map)
Full-stack technical versatility across languages (TypeScript, DLang, Java, C/C++), platforms, and domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, products, or platforms—critical gap for a director-level 'AI Strategy' role that explicitly requires this as a key responsibility
Missing preferred advanced degree in AI field (only BS Computer Science from 2012); only very recent AI-adjacent work at re:cinq (2 months) with MCP/agentic workflows
Limited deep cloud platform architecture or strategy experience; AWS CDK usage at one company insufficient for advising on 'cutting-edge cloud and AI technologies'
response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished engineer with the required seniority and experience breadth, the position demands 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' as a core responsibility. The resume shows no AI/ML background, no advanced AI education, and only nascent AI-adjacent work started two months ago. For a director-level AI Strategy role, this expertise gap is disqualifying—the candidate would be entering a specialized domain without established credibility.
